channel.title: GitHub SCSS Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of SCSS in GitHub

item.title: jgthms/bulma
item.description: Modern CSS framework based on Flexbox

item.title: Ileriayo/markdown-badges
item.description: Badges for your personal developer branding, profile, and projects.

item.title: Dorota1997/react-frontend-dev-portfolio
item.description: Easy to adapt and deploy React portfolio inspired with solutions found at GitHub.

item.title: jekyll/minima
item.description: Minima is a one-size-fits-all Jekyll theme for writers.

item.title: slatedocs/slate
item.description: Beautiful static documentation for your API

item.title: NoroffFEU/css-frameworks-ca
item.description: A template repository used for student CSS Frameworks CA submissions.

item.title: mpa139/allanlab
item.description: Allan Lab website

item.title: andrewbanchich/forty-jekyll-theme
item.description: A Jekyll version of the "Forty" theme by HTML5 UP.

item.title: duckduckgo/duckduckgo-help-pages
item.description: DuckDuckGo Help Pages

item.title: pages-themes/leap-day
item.description: Leap day is a Jekyll theme for GitHub Pages

item.title: RayeRen/acad-homepage.github.io
item.description: AcadHomepage: A Modern and Responsive Academic Personal Homepage

item.title: abhinavs/moonwalk
item.description: A fast & minimal Jekyll blog theme with clean dark mode

item.title: near/docs
item.description: NEAR Protocol Documentation

item.title: naveen-kumawat/Flower
item.description: Develop Beautiful Flowers Using only HTML, CSS and JS

item.title: spinkube/documentation
item.description: Site and Docs for the SpinKube community project

item.title: jamigibbs/phantom
item.description: A minimalist, responsive portfolio theme for Jekyll with Bootstrap

item.title: twbs/bootstrap-sass
item.description: Official Sass port of Bootstrap 2 and 3.

item.title: SlRvb/Obsidian--ITS-Theme
item.description: Theme designed with readability and customizability in mind. Change it easily to your liking with the Style Settings plugin installed.

item.title: prometheus/docs
item.description: Prometheus documentation: content and static site generator

item.title: ubuntu/yaru
item.description: All Ubuntu Yaru GNOME themes

item.title: creativetimofficial/soft-ui-dashboard
item.description: Soft UI Dashboard - Free and OpenSource Bootstrap 5 Dashboard
